title: Leon Black refuses to answer questions on NDAs at Jeffrey Epstein hearing, Rep. Comer says
summary_full: "I knew Jekyll. I didn't know Hyde," Leon Black says about Jeffrey Epstein in his prepared statement to the House Oversight and Government Reform Committee.
summary_public: "I knew Jekyll. I didn't know Hyde," Leon Black says about Jeffrey Epstein in his prepared statement to the House Oversight and Government Reform Committee.
